scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
ministry: Ministry of Finance / Department of Financial Services
benefit: ₹2 lakh life insurance cover on death (any cause). Annual premium: ₹436/year (auto-debited from bank account).
application_portal: Through bank branches / Jan Suraksha portal
notes: One of the simplest central schemes. Very broad eligibility. Often bundled with PMJDY account. Auto-renewal via bank debit on 1 June each year.

conditions.source: PMJJBY scheme document — age 18–50 years at time of enrollment. Cover continues till 55.
PMJJBY — bank account mandatory for premium auto-debit

conditions.description: Account must have sufficient balance for premium debit
conditions.source: PMJJBY — premium ₹436/year auto-debited; lapse if insufficient balance
conditions.ambiguity_note: Assumes basic bank balance available — actual lapse risk not assessed at eligibility stage
